_note: Field observation log. Each entry must include before/after metric readings, asset profile, intervention type and count. 'source' must be a direct observation, not community data.

xpCostBase.note: Back-calculated from gain ratio in source calibration. Structural constant — recalibrate once first field data available.

xpCostDecayK.note: CV 3.2% across 5 source-domain observations. Recalibrate from field data.

baseXpPerSession.note: MUST be back-calculated from first controlled field intervention. Formula: solve for bXPS where engine projection = observed metric gain for known cycleCount and asset profile.

sessionBudgetDecay.note: Geometric shape confirmed in source domain. Decay constant may differ for logistics interventions.
